meta.title: Cigar Shop. The Art of Patience
meta.description: Cigar Shop, premium destination for cigars, whisky and the ritual of patience. 5 stores across Belgrade.

hero.tagline: A premium retail chain of the finest cigar brands, quality accessories and premium spirits.

slideB.title: Seven regions, one passion.
slideB.sub: From Vuelta Abajo to Estelí, from Cibao to Jamastran. Every box carries decades of silence and the hand that rolled it.

slideC.title: Five addresses. Five humidors.
slideC.sub: From Ušće to Kosovska, step into a shop where the cigar has waited for you for years.

manifest.title: The art of patience.
manifest.lead: Cigar Shop is a premium retail chain of the finest cigar brands, quality accessories and premium spirits.
manifest.body: Five stores across Belgrade. Over 500 cigars from seven countries and more than 260 selected bottles across eight categories. Cigars from Cuba, the Dominican Republic, Nicaragua, Honduras, Costa Rica, Mexico and Italy stand beside Scotch, Irish, Japanese and Oriental whiskies, bourbon, cognac, gin, rum, vodka, domestic rakija and wine. Alongside them, the tools that complete the ritual: cutters, lighters, humidors, ashtrays and travel cases.

brands.title: From field to humidor.
brands.lead: Over 70 brands from seven countries. Each is the seal of a region, a dynasty and decades of patience. Choose a region, discover the story.

gallery.title: The ritual, framed.
gallery.lead: Boxes, crowns, embers, the humidor, moments words cannot describe.

library.title: From field to humidor.
library.lead: Over 70 brands from seven countries. Pick a region, discover the story of tobacco and a gallery of cigars.

process.title: Ten years of silence before one draw.
process.body1: It all starts in the field. Seeds hand-selected by Cuban vegueros for centuries grow under full sun and the shade of cloth canopies. Leaves are harvested in strict order, oldest to youngest, each with a role: crown, full aroma, heart, wrapper.
process.body2: Then fermentation, the hardest and quietest stage: four, eight, even fourteen months the tobacco rests in cool pilas presses. Temperature is measured every day, leaves are turned, humidity is tamed. Only then rolling, the torcedor's hand that spent decades learning a delicate pressure, and the humidor, where the cigar waits for the one who will give it its first ember.

humidor.title: Step into the humidor.
humidor.lead: The cigar that waits for you here has spent years in silence, now it waits for smoke.
humidor.body: Every humidor we run is a promise to the buyer. 70% humidity, a constant 20°C, refrigerated Spanish cedar that smells as it should. The Cohiba you take home today felt exactly the same in the roller's hands ten years ago. That is the only difference between a cigar and a cigar worth smoking.

spirits.title: Liquid companions of smoke.
spirits.lead: Whisky, bourbon, cognac, gin, rum, vodka, rakija, wine. Every category carries its own geography and rhythm.

spiritsProcess.title: The oil of time, sealed in a bottle.
spiritsProcess.body1: Every bottle we choose has traveled a road that spans generations. Scottish Islay gives peaty smoke, Japanese Yamazaki the floral precision, Cuban rum the Caribbean sun, Serbian rakija the authenticity of these lands.
spiritsProcess.body2: Beside a cigar, a drink must never dominate, only accompany. That is why our shelf is a map — seven continents, hundreds of distilleries, a selection that is not made overnight.

gear.title: Tools of the ritual.
gear.lead: Cutters, lighters, humidors, ashtrays, travel cases. The ritual is incomplete without accessories worth remembering.

gearProcess.title: The details that make the cigar a ritual.
gearProcess.body1: A cigar demands company. The cutter must be sharp, the lighter scent-free, the humidor humid just so. Each of these objects carries its own small engineering story, and together they set the stage where smoke takes form.
gearProcess.body2: Our shelf carries Xikar, S.T. Dupont, Les Fines Lames, Colibri, Adorini, Daniel Marshall and Boveda. Classics worth remembering and pieces worth passing on.

ritual.title: Cut. Light. Savor.
ritual.step1Body: A sharp, clean cut, 2 mm above the cap.
ritual.step2Body: Cedar match or scentless butane flame.
ritual.step3Body: One draw per minute. Don't rush, the ember hates hurry.
